items.title: 應答問題：會議時間

sentences.speaker: Q
sentences.text: When is the budget meeting scheduled to start?

items.question: What is the best response?
items.transcriptZh: 預算會議預計何時開始？
items.tip: When 問「時間」，直接找含時間的選項；地點（where）與 Yes/No 回答都是陷阱。

items.title: 應答問題：影印機

sentences.speaker: Q
sentences.text: Why isn't the photocopier working?

items.question: What is the best response?
items.transcriptZh: 影印機為什麼不能用？
items.tip: Why 問「原因」，找能解釋理由的選項，常以 Because 開頭或直接說明狀況。

items.title: 簡短對話：出差安排

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Hi Mark, have you booked your flight to the Chicago conference yet?

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Not yet. I was waiting for the department to approve my travel budget.

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: It was approved this morning. You should book soon — prices go up every day.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Thanks for letting me know. I'll do it right after lunch.

items.question: What will the man probably do after lunch?
options: Have a meeting with the woman
items.transcriptZh: 女：嗨 Mark，你訂好去芝加哥研討會的機票了嗎？／男：還沒，我在等部門核准我的差旅預算。／女：今天早上核准了。你最好快點訂，價格每天都在漲。／男：謝謝妳告訴我，我午餐後馬上訂。
items.tip: 「接下來會做什麼」的答案幾乎都在對話的最後一、兩句。

items.title: 簡短對話：辦公室搬遷

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Sarah, did you hear that our office is moving to the new building in September?

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Yes, I did. I'm a bit worried about the longer commute, though.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Actually, the new location is right next to a subway station.

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Oh, that's a relief. Then it might even be faster for me.

items.question: Why was the woman worried?
options: The new office is too small.
The move is happening too soon.
optionsZh: 她的通勤時間可能變長。
items.transcriptZh: 男：Sarah，妳聽說了嗎？我們辦公室九月要搬到新大樓。／女：聽說了，不過我有點擔心通勤時間會變長。／男：其實新地點就在地鐵站旁邊。／女：喔，那我就放心了，說不定對我來說反而更快。
items.tip: 注意 though、actually 這類語氣詞，考點常出現在它們前後。

items.title: 簡短獨白：機場廣播

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Attention, passengers on Flight 372 to Toronto.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Due to a mechanical issue, your departure has been delayed by approximately two hours.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: As an apology, meal vouchers are available at the service counter next to Gate 12.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: We will make another announcement once a new boarding time is confirmed.

items.question: What can passengers get at the service counter?
items.transcriptZh: 搭乘 372 號班機前往多倫多的旅客請注意。由於機械故障，您的班機將延誤約兩小時。作為補償，旅客可至 12 號登機門旁的服務櫃檯領取餐券。新的登機時間確認後，我們將再次廣播通知。
items.tip: 廣播題常考「補償措施」與「下一步指示」，聽到 as an apology / please 就要提高警覺。

items.title: 簡短獨白：電話留言

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Hello, this is Diane from Kingsway Dental Clinic.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: I'm calling to remind you of your appointment this Thursday at 3 p.m.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: If you need to reschedule, please call us at least 24 hours in advance.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Otherwise, we look forward to seeing you then. Thank you.

items.question: Why is the speaker calling?
options: To remind the listener of an appointment
items.transcriptZh: 您好，我是 Kingsway 牙醫診所的 Diane。來電是想提醒您本週四下午三點的預約。如需改期，請至少提前二十四小時來電。否則我們屆時恭候您的光臨，謝謝。
items.tip: 留言題的「目的」通常在第二句：I'm calling to... 後面就是答案。

items.title: 應答問題：主題演講

sentences.speaker: Q
sentences.text: Who is giving the keynote speech at the conference?

items.question: What is the best response?
options: Dr. Reeves from the head office.
optionsZh: 總公司的 Reeves 博士。
items.transcriptZh: 誰要在研討會上發表主題演講？
items.tip: Who 問「人」，地點與時間選項都是陷阱。

items.title: 應答問題：銷售數據

sentences.speaker: Q
sentences.text: Where can I find the quarterly sales figures?

items.question: What is the best response?
items.transcriptZh: 我在哪裡可以找到季度銷售數據？
items.tip: Where 問「位置」；quarterly 引誘你選頻率選項，別上當。

items.title: 應答問題：訓練時長

sentences.speaker: Q
sentences.text: How long will the training session last?

items.question: What is the best response?
options: About two and a half hours.
items.transcriptZh: 訓練課程會進行多久？
items.tip: How long 問「時間長度」；Twice a week 是 How often 的答案。

items.title: 應答問題：寄送報告

sentences.speaker: Q
sentences.text: Would you like me to email you the report?

items.question: What is the best response?
items.transcriptZh: 需要我把報告用電子郵件寄給你嗎？
items.tip: Would you like...? 是提議，接受或婉拒的選項才是正解。

items.title: 應答問題：停車場

sentences.speaker: Q
sentences.text: Why is the parking lot closed today?

items.question: What is the best response?
items.transcriptZh: 停車場今天為什麼關閉？
items.tip: Why 問「原因」，說明狀況的選項就是答案，不一定有 because。

items.title: 應答問題：藥局營業時間

sentences.speaker: Q
sentences.text: When does the pharmacy close on weekends?

items.question: What is the best response?
items.transcriptZh: 藥局週末幾點打烊？
items.tip: When 問「時間點」，找 at + 時刻的選項。

items.title: 應答問題：加班核准

sentences.speaker: Q
sentences.text: Who approved the overtime request?

items.question: What is the best response?
options: By the end of the month.
items.transcriptZh: 加班申請是誰核准的？
items.tip: Who 的答案常用「人 + did」的簡答形式。

items.title: 應答問題：影印紙

sentences.speaker: Q
sentences.text: Shouldn't we order more paper for the copier?

items.question: What is the best response?
items.transcriptZh: 我們是不是該多訂一些影印紙？
items.tip: 否定疑問句 Shouldn't we...? 是提議，回答同意/不同意即可。

items.title: 應答問題：差旅核銷

sentences.speaker: Q
sentences.text: How do I get reimbursed for my travel expenses?

items.question: What is the best response?
items.transcriptZh: 我要怎麼申請差旅費核銷？
items.tip: How 問「方法」，答案通常是一個指示句（動詞開頭）。

items.title: 應答問題：外燴廠商

sentences.speaker: Q
sentences.text: Which caterer did you choose for the banquet?

items.question: What is the best response?
options: The one we used last year.
optionsZh: 我們去年用過的那一家。
items.transcriptZh: 你為宴會選了哪一家外燴廠商？
items.tip: Which 問「哪一個」，答案常用 The one... 的代稱形式。

items.title: 簡短對話：客訴處理

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Mr. Davis, a customer just called about a damaged package.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Oh no. Did she say what was broken?

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: The coffee maker inside was cracked. She's asking for a replacement.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Send her a new one today, and include a discount coupon for the trouble.

items.question: What does the man ask the woman to do?
options: Send a replacement and a coupon
optionsZh: 寄出新品並附上折價券
items.transcriptZh: 女：Davis 先生，剛有位顧客來電反映包裹損壞。／男：糟糕，她有說是什麼壞了嗎？／女：裡面的咖啡機裂了，她要求換貨。／男：今天就寄一台新的給她，再附上一張折價券表示歉意。
items.tip: 「要求做什麼」的答案通常在最後一句的祈使句裡。

items.title: 簡短對話：會議改期

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Laura, the budget meeting on Wednesday needs to be moved.

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Why? Is the finance director unavailable?

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Yes, he'll be at the Berlin trade fair until Thursday.

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Alright, I'll book the conference room for Friday morning instead.

items.question: When will the meeting most likely take place?
items.transcriptZh: 男：Laura，週三的預算會議需要改期。／女：為什麼？財務長沒空嗎？／男：對，他要去柏林商展，週四才回來。／女：好，那我改訂週五早上的會議室。
items.tip: 時間題會出現多個日期混淆你，最後確定的那個才是答案。

items.title: 簡短對話：新人訓練

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Have you met the new interns yet? They start on Monday.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Not yet. Who's running their orientation?

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: I am, but I could use some help with the office tour.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Happy to help. Just tell me what time to be there.

items.question: What does the woman ask the man to do?
items.transcriptZh: 女：你見過新來的實習生了嗎？他們週一報到。／男：還沒，新人訓練是誰負責？／女：是我，不過辦公室導覽的部分我需要人幫忙。／男：樂意幫忙，告訴我幾點到就行。
items.tip: I could use some help with... 是委婉的請求句型，就是考點。

items.title: 簡短對話：餐廳訂位

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Hello, I'd like to book a table for eight people this Saturday at seven.

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: I'm sorry, sir. We're fully booked at seven, but we have space at eight thirty.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Hmm, that's a bit late. Do you have anything earlier?

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: We could seat your group at five thirty, if that works for you.

items.question: Why is the man unable to book a table at seven o'clock?
items.transcriptZh: 男：您好，我想訂這週六晚上七點、八個人的位子。／女：抱歉先生，七點已經訂滿了，不過八點半還有位子。／男：嗯，有點晚，有更早的時段嗎？／女：如果可以的話，五點半可以安排您這一組入座。
items.tip: 原因通常緊跟在 I'm sorry / unfortunately 之後。

items.title: 簡短對話：商展成果

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: How was the trade show in Chicago, Ken?

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Very productive. I collected over thirty business cards from potential clients.

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Great! Can you present your findings at Monday's staff meeting?

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Sure, I'll prepare some slides over the weekend.

items.question: What will the man do over the weekend?
items.transcriptZh: 女：Ken，芝加哥的商展如何？／男：收穫很多，我從潛在客戶那裡收到三十多張名片。／女：太好了！你可以在週一的員工會議上報告成果嗎？／男：沒問題，我週末會準備一些投影片。
items.tip: 「接下來要做什麼」看最後一句；注意時間詞 over the weekend。

items.title: 簡短對話：投影機故障

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: The projector in the meeting room keeps shutting down.

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Again? We just had it repaired last month.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: I think it's time to buy a new one. Repairs are getting expensive.

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: You're right. I'll ask the vendor for a quotation this afternoon.

items.question: What will the woman do this afternoon?
items.transcriptZh: 男：會議室的投影機一直自動關機。／女：又來了？上個月才修過。／男：我覺得該買新的了，維修費越來越貴。／女：你說得對，我今天下午向廠商要一份報價單。
items.tip: quotation（報價單）是多益核心單字，聽到要能馬上反應。

items.title: 簡短對話：會員續約

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Hi, I'd like to renew my gym membership, but the annual fee seems higher this year.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Yes, it went up slightly, but the new fee includes unlimited yoga classes.

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Oh, in that case it's actually a good deal. I'll renew for a year.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Great. And if you renew today, you'll also get a free water bottle.

items.question: Why does the woman decide to renew her membership?
optionsZh: 健身房延長了營業時間
items.transcriptZh: 女：你好，我想續約健身房會員，但今年的年費好像變貴了。／男：對，漲了一點，不過新費用包含無限次瑜伽課。／女：這樣的話其實很划算，那我續約一年。／男：好的，而且今天續約還送一個免費水壺。
items.tip: in that case 之前的那句話，就是她改變主意的原因。

items.title: 簡短對話：機場報到

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Good morning. I'd like to check in for the ten o'clock flight to Vancouver.

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Certainly. Would you like a window or an aisle seat?

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: An aisle seat, please. And can I carry this bag on board?

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: I'm afraid it's slightly over the weight limit, so it will need to be checked.

items.question: What problem does the man have?
items.transcriptZh: 男：早安，我要辦理十點飛溫哥華班機的報到。／女：好的，您要靠窗還是靠走道的座位？／男：靠走道，謝謝。另外這個包包可以帶上飛機嗎？／女：恐怕稍微超重了，必須托運。
items.tip: I'm afraid... 後面接的通常就是「問題點」。

items.title: 簡短獨白：訂單延遲留言

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Hello, this message is for Ms. Carter. This is Ryan from Brightway Furniture.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: The bookshelf you ordered is temporarily out of stock.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: A new shipment will arrive at our warehouse next Tuesday, and we can deliver it to you the following day.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: If you would prefer a refund instead, please call us back at 555-0147. We apologize for the inconvenience.

items.question: When can the bookshelf be delivered?
items.transcriptZh: 您好，這是給 Carter 女士的留言。我是 Brightway 家具的 Ryan。您訂購的書櫃目前暫時缺貨。新一批貨將於下週二抵達我們的倉庫，隔天即可為您送達。若您希望改為退款，請回電 555-0147。造成不便，敬請見諒。
items.tip: the following day（隔天）要換算：週二到貨 → 週三送達，考的是推理不是聽寫。

items.title: 簡短獨白：車站廣播

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: May I have your attention, please.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: The 4:15 express train to Manchester has been canceled due to signal problems.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Passengers holding tickets for this service may board the 4:45 local train at platform two, or request a full refund at the ticket office.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: We are sorry for any inconvenience caused.

items.question: What are the passengers advised to do?
options: Take the 4:45 train or get a refund
Buy new tickets at platform two
optionsZh: 等待四點十五分的列車
改搭四點四十五分的列車或辦理退款
items.transcriptZh: 各位旅客請注意。開往曼徹斯特的四點十五分特快列車因號誌故障停駛。持有該班次車票的旅客可至二號月台改搭四點四十五分的普通車，或至售票處辦理全額退款。造成不便，敬請見諒。
items.tip: 廣播題必考「乘客該怎麼辦」，注意 may / please 後面的指示。

items.title: 簡短獨白：員工會議開場

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Good morning, everyone, and welcome to our quarterly staff meeting.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Before we begin, I have one announcement.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Starting next month, the cafeteria on the third floor will stay open until eight p.m. for employees working late.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Today's agenda includes the sales report, the new vacation policy, and our office relocation plan, so let's get started.

items.question: What change will happen next month?
options: The cafeteria hours will be extended
A new sales team will start
optionsZh: 員工餐廳將延長營業時間
items.transcriptZh: 大家早安，歡迎參加季度員工會議。開始之前，我有一項宣布：自下個月起，三樓員工餐廳將營業至晚上八點，方便加班的同仁。今天的議程包括銷售報告、新休假制度與辦公室搬遷計畫，我們開始吧。
items.tip: Starting next month（自下月起）這類時間詞後面，就是「改變」的內容。

items.title: 簡短獨白：廣告

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Are you looking for a quiet place to focus?

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Maple Tree Coworking has just opened its newest location downtown.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: For only ninety-nine dollars a month, members enjoy high-speed internet, free coffee, and access to private meeting rooms.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Sign up before July 31 and get your first month at half price. Visit our website today.

items.question: What can customers get by signing up before July 31?
options: Fifty percent off the first month
items.transcriptZh: 你在尋找一個可以專心的安靜空間嗎？Maple Tree 共享辦公室最新據點已在市中心開幕。每月只要九十九美元，會員即可享有高速網路、免費咖啡與私人會議室。七月三十一日前註冊，首月享半價優惠。立即造訪我們的網站。
items.tip: 廣告題必考「限時優惠」：half price = fifty percent off，聽懂換句話說。

items.title: 簡短獨白：博物館導覽

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Welcome to the Riverside Art Museum.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Before we begin the tour, please note that flash photography is not allowed in the galleries.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: The tour will last about ninety minutes and will end at the gift shop, where you'll receive a ten percent discount on all souvenirs today.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Now, follow me to the first exhibition hall.

items.question: What are visitors NOT allowed to do?
items.transcriptZh: 歡迎來到河濱美術館。導覽開始前請注意，展廳內禁止使用閃光燈拍照。導覽全程約九十分鐘，最後會在禮品店結束，今天購買任何紀念品都可享九折優惠。現在請跟我前往第一展覽廳。
items.tip: 聽到 not allowed / prohibited 馬上記下來，NOT 題型專考這個。

items.title: 簡短獨白：交通路況報導

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: You're listening to Radio 88.5 traffic update.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Roadwork on the Harbour Bridge is causing long delays this morning, with traffic backed up for nearly three kilometers.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Drivers heading into the city are advised to use the Riverside Tunnel instead.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: The roadwork is expected to continue until Friday evening. We'll bring you another update in thirty minutes.

items.question: What are drivers advised to do?
items.transcriptZh: 您正在收聽 88.5 電台路況報導。港灣大橋今早因道路施工造成嚴重回堵，車流回堵近三公里。建議進城的駕駛人改走河濱隧道。施工預計持續到週五晚間，三十分鐘後我們將帶來最新路況。
items.tip: are advised to（建議）後面就是答案；選項會把原句換個說法。

items.title: 應答問題：盤點進度

sentences.speaker: Q
sentences.text: Haven't you finished the inventory count yet?

items.question: What is the best response?
options: No, I still have two aisles left.
items.transcriptZh: 你還沒盤點完庫存嗎？
items.tip: 否定疑問句照一般疑問句回答：還沒完成就答 No + 說明。

items.title: 應答問題：會議紀錄

sentences.speaker: Q
sentences.text: Could you forward me the meeting minutes?

items.question: What is the best response?
options: Sure, I'll send them right away.
items.transcriptZh: 可以把會議紀錄轉寄給我嗎？
items.tip: Could you...? 是請求，接受或婉拒的回答才對；minutes 是會議紀錄不是分鐘。

items.title: 應答問題：手冊擺放

sentences.speaker: Q
sentences.text: Where should I put these brochures?

items.question: What is the best response?
options: On the display rack near the door.
optionsZh: 放在門口附近的展示架上。
items.transcriptZh: 這些簡介手冊該放哪裡？
items.tip: Where 問地點，找含 on / in / near 的位置選項。

items.title: 應答問題：搭車提議

sentences.speaker: Q
sentences.text: Why don't we take a taxi to the trade show?

items.question: What is the best response?
options: Good idea — parking there is terrible.
No, I didn't see the show.
items.transcriptZh: 我們何不搭計程車去商展？
items.tip: Why don't we...? 是提議不是問原因，回答同意/不同意。

items.title: 應答問題：關店負責人

sentences.speaker: Q
sentences.text: Who's supposed to lock up the store tonight?

items.question: What is the best response?
items.transcriptZh: 今晚輪到誰鎖店門？
items.tip: Who 問人，「輪到某人」（it's ~'s turn）是常見答法。

items.title: 應答問題：接駁車班次

sentences.speaker: Q
sentences.text: How often does the shuttle run to the airport?

items.question: What is the best response?
items.transcriptZh: 往機場的接駁車多久一班？
items.tip: How often 問頻率，答案是 every + 時間。

items.title: 應答問題：場次選擇

sentences.speaker: Q
sentences.text: Would you prefer the morning or the afternoon session?

items.question: What is the best response?
items.transcriptZh: 你想參加上午場還是下午場？
items.tip: A or B 選擇疑問句不能回答 Yes / No，要選其中一個。

items.title: 應答問題：碳粉用完

sentences.speaker: Q
sentences.text: The printer's out of toner again, isn't it?

items.question: What is the best response?
items.transcriptZh: 印表機又沒碳粉了，對吧？
items.tip: 附加問句（isn't it?）確認事實，回答同意與後續處理最自然。

items.title: 簡短對話：網路連線問題

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: IT desk, this is Amber. How can I help?

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Hi, my laptop won't connect to the office Wi-Fi since this morning.

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: We updated the network overnight. You'll need to log in again with your new employee password.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Ah, that explains it. I'll try that right now.

items.question: What most likely caused the man's problem?
items.transcriptZh: 女：資訊服務台，我是 Amber，需要什麼協助？／男：你好，我的筆電從今天早上就連不上辦公室 Wi-Fi。／女：我們昨晚更新了網路系統，你需要用新的員工密碼重新登入。／男：啊，原來如此，我現在就試。
items.tip: 原因常由對方（客服）說出，不是提問者自己。

items.title: 簡短對話：文具缺貨

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Priya, did the stationery order arrive?

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Only partially. The folders came, but the printer paper is on back order.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: We're nearly out. Can you ask the supplier to expedite it?

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: I'll call them right after lunch.

items.question: What will the woman do after lunch?
items.transcriptZh: 男：Priya，文具訂單到貨了嗎？／女：只到了一部分。資料夾來了，但影印紙還在候補出貨。／男：我們的紙快用完了，可以請供應商加急處理嗎？／女：我午餐後馬上打給他們。
items.tip: on back order（候補出貨）與 expedite（加急）都是多益高頻詞。

items.title: 簡短對話：宴會人手不足

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Tom, two servers called in sick for tonight's banquet.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: That's bad timing. Can we ask the part-timers to cover?

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: I've texted them — one can come, but we're still short one person.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Then I'll help serve tonight as well.

items.question: What does the man offer to do?
items.transcriptZh: 女：Tom，今晚宴會有兩位服務生請病假。／男：時機真不巧。可以請兼職人員來代班嗎？／女：我傳訊息問過了——一位可以來，但還缺一個人。／男：那我今晚也下場幫忙服務。
items.tip: call in sick（打電話請病假）、cover（代班）是職場高頻用語。

items.title: 簡短對話：差旅預算刪減

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Elena, have you seen the travel budget for next quarter?

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Yes, it's been cut by fifteen percent.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Then we should switch some client visits to video calls.

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Agreed. Let's identify which trips are essential first.

items.question: What do the speakers decide to do first?
optionsZh: 先確認哪些出差是必要的
items.transcriptZh: 男：Elena，你看過下一季的差旅預算了嗎？／女：看了，被砍了百分之十五。／男：那我們應該把部分客戶拜訪改成視訊會議。／女：同意。我們先確認哪些出差是必要的吧。
items.tip: 問「先做什麼」注意 first / to begin with 出現的那句。

items.title: 簡短對話：賣場陳列

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: The new spring display looks great, but customers keep asking where the sale items are.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Maybe we should move the sale rack closer to the entrance.

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Good idea. Let's do it before the weekend rush.

items.question: What will the speakers probably do?
items.transcriptZh: 女：新的春季陳列很好看，但顧客一直在問特價商品在哪裡。／男：也許我們該把特價商品架移到靠近入口的地方。／女：好主意，趁週末人潮前趕快做。
items.tip: 「接下來會做什麼」聽提議句（Maybe we should...）加上對方同意就是答案。

items.title: 簡短對話：報名確認信

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Hi, I registered for the finance conference, but I haven't received a confirmation email.

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Let me check... it seems your email address was entered incorrectly.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Oh, could you fix it? It's m-lee at fintech dot com.

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Done. The confirmation should arrive within a few minutes.

items.question: What caused the problem?
optionsZh: 電子郵件地址輸入錯誤
items.transcriptZh: 男：你好，我報名了金融研討會，但一直沒收到確認信。／女：我查一下……看來您的電子郵件地址輸入錯了。／男：喔，可以幫我改嗎？是 m-lee@fintech.com。／女：改好了，確認信幾分鐘內就會寄達。
items.tip: 問題原因常在 it seems / I'm afraid 之後。

items.title: 簡短對話：看辦公室

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Thanks for showing me the office space. The location is perfect.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: It's popular — another company is viewing it tomorrow.

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: In that case, I'd like to submit an application today.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Great, I'll email you the form as soon as I'm back at the office.

items.question: Why does the woman want to apply today?
optionsZh: 她目前的租約明天到期
items.transcriptZh: 女：謝謝你帶我看這個辦公空間，地點太完美了。／男：這裡很搶手——明天還有另一家公司要來看。／女：這樣的話，我今天就想提出申請。／男：好的，我一回辦公室就把表格寄給您。
items.tip: In that case（這樣的話）前面那句，就是她改變行動的原因。

items.title: 簡短獨白：賣場廣播

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Attention, Value Mart shoppers.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: For the next hour, all bakery items are twenty percent off at the in-store bakery.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Also, don't forget our loyalty program — sign up at any register and earn points on today's purchase.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: The store will close at ten tonight. Thank you for shopping with us.

items.question: What can shoppers do at any register?
items.transcriptZh: Value Mart 的顧客請注意。接下來一小時，店內烘焙坊全品項八折。另外別忘了我們的會員集點計畫——在任一收銀台即可申辦，今日消費就能累積點數。本店今晚十點打烊，感謝您的光臨。
items.tip: 地點細節題：註冊地點（at any register）與折扣地點（bakery）是分開的，別混淆。

items.title: 簡短獨白：工廠導覽

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Welcome to the Sterling Chocolate factory tour.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: During the visit, please stay behind the yellow lines at all times, as the machinery operates continuously.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: At the end of the tour, everyone will receive a free sample box, and you can purchase our full range at the factory shop.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Now, let's begin in the roasting room.

items.question: What will visitors receive at the end of the tour?
items.transcriptZh: 歡迎參加 Sterling 巧克力工廠導覽。參觀期間，由於機器持續運轉，請全程站在黃線後方。導覽結束時，每位訪客都將獲得免費試吃禮盒，也可以在工廠商店選購全系列商品。現在，我們從烘豆室開始。
items.tip: 「At the end of...」之後常接贈品或下一步指示，是必考句。

items.title: 簡短獨白：面試通知留言

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Hello, this message is for Mr. Nguyen. This is Carol from Westfield Recruitment.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: The hiring manager at Delta Finance was impressed with your first interview and would like to invite you for a second one next Wednesday at 2 p.m.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Please call me back by Monday to confirm, and bring two references with you.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Talk soon.

items.question: What should the listener bring to the interview?
items.transcriptZh: 您好，這是給 Nguyen 先生的留言。我是 Westfield 人力仲介的 Carol。Delta 金融的招聘主管對您的第一次面試印象深刻，想邀請您下週三下午兩點參加第二次面試。請在週一前回電確認，並攜帶兩位推薦人資料。再聯絡。
items.tip: 留言題必考「聽者要做什麼」：注意 please 後面的兩個指示。

items.title: 簡短獨白：登機門變更

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Attention passengers on Maple Air Flight 88 to Calgary.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: The departure gate has been changed from B6 to C12.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Boarding will begin in approximately twenty minutes.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Passengers requiring assistance or traveling with small children may board first. Please have your boarding pass and photo ID ready.

items.question: What change is announced?
items.transcriptZh: 搭乘楓葉航空 88 號班機前往卡加利的旅客請注意。登機門已從 B6 變更為 C12。約二十分鐘後開始登機。需要協助或攜帶幼童的旅客可優先登機。請備妥登機證與附照片的身分證件。
items.tip: 機場廣播三大考點：變更內容、登機時間、優先登機對象。

items.title: 簡短獨白：圖書館廣播

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Good evening, Westbrook Library patrons. The library will be closing in fifteen minutes.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Please bring any items you wish to borrow to the front desk now.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Also, a reminder that starting next month, the library will open on Sundays from noon to five.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Details are available on our website. Thank you, and we'll see you again soon.

items.question: What will happen starting next month?
options: The library will close on Sundays
The library will open on Sundays
items.transcriptZh: Westbrook 圖書館的讀者晚安，本館將於十五分鐘後閉館。欲借閱的讀者請現在將書籍帶至櫃檯辦理。另外提醒您，自下個月起，本館週日將開放，時間為中午十二點至下午五點。詳情請見官網。謝謝，期待再次見到您。
items.tip: starting next month（自下月起）後面就是「未來變更」題的答案。

items.title: 照片描述：辦公室

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: A. The man is talking on the phone.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: B. The man is typing on a laptop.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: C. The man is opening a drawer.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: D. The man is wiping the desk.

items.question: 請看照片，選出最符合的描述。
options: The man is talking on the phone.
The man is typing on a laptop.
The man is opening a drawer.
The man is wiping the desk.
items.transcriptZh: 照片重點：一名男子坐在辦公桌前，正用筆電打字，桌上有一杯咖啡。
items.tip: Part 1 先鎖定「主詞＋正在進行的動作」。電話、抽屜都是辦公室照片的常見陷阱，照片裡沒有的動作一律刪掉。

items.title: 照片描述：會議

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: A. They are leaving the meeting room.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: B. They are looking at their phones.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: C. They are attending a meeting.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: D. They are standing by the window.

items.question: 請看照片，選出最符合的描述。
options: They are leaving the meeting room.
They are looking at their phones.
They are standing by the window.
items.transcriptZh: 照片重點：幾位同事圍著會議桌開會，一人站在白板前簡報。
items.tip: 多人照片先確認「大家共同在做的事」。attend a meeting（參加會議）是 Part 1 高頻片語。

items.title: 照片描述：倒咖啡

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: A. The woman is drinking from a cup.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: B. The woman is washing a kettle.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: C. The woman is cutting some fruit.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: D. The woman is pouring coffee into a cup.

items.question: 請看照片，選出最符合的描述。
options: The woman is drinking from a cup.
The woman is washing a kettle.
The woman is cutting some fruit.
The woman is pouring coffee into a cup.
optionsZh: 女子正把咖啡倒進杯子裡。
items.transcriptZh: 照片重點：一名女子拿著咖啡壺，正把咖啡倒進櫃檯上的杯子。
items.tip: 「喝 drink」和「倒 pour」是經典動作陷阱：物品對了、動作不對就不能選。

items.title: 照片描述：倉庫

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: A. Boxes are stacked on top of each other.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: B. Boxes are being loaded onto a truck.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: C. A worker is opening a box.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: D. The shelves are empty.

items.question: 請看照片，選出最符合的描述。
options: Boxes are stacked on top of each other.
Boxes are being loaded onto a truck.
A worker is opening a box.
optionsZh: 一名工人正在打開紙箱。
items.transcriptZh: 照片重點：倉庫裡的紙箱層層堆疊，架上也放著箱子，照片中沒有人。
items.tip: 被動進行式 are being loaded 需要「有人正在做這件事」；照片裡沒有人，就不能選進行中的動作。

items.title: 照片描述：停車

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: A. The car is being repaired.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: B. The car is parked in front of a building.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: C. The driver is getting out of the car.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: D. The car is stopped at a traffic light.

items.question: 請看照片，選出最符合的描述。
options: The car is parked in front of a building.
The driver is getting out of the car.
The car is stopped at a traffic light.
items.transcriptZh: 照片重點：一輛車停放在大樓前方，車內沒有人。
items.tip: is parked（停放的狀態）常考。照片裡沒有人就刪掉所有「人的動作」選項。

items.title: 照片描述：騎腳踏車

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: A. The man is repairing a bicycle.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: B. The man is walking along the road.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: C. The man is riding a bicycle.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: D. The man is carrying a helmet.

items.question: 請看照片，選出最符合的描述。
options: The man is repairing a bicycle.
The man is walking along the road.
The man is riding a bicycle.
The man is carrying a helmet.
items.transcriptZh: 照片重點：一名男子在樹旁的小路上騎腳踏車。
items.tip: 同一個物品（bicycle）配不同動詞是常見出題法：騎、修理、牽，看清楚照片裡的動作。

items.title: 照片描述：月台

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: A. Passengers are boarding a train.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: B. The train is leaving the station.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: C. People are buying tickets.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: D. Luggage is piled on the platform.

items.question: 請看照片，選出最符合的描述。
options: The train is leaving the station.
Luggage is piled on the platform.
items.transcriptZh: 照片重點：火車停靠月台、車門開啟，兩名乘客正走向車門準備上車。
items.tip: board（登上交通工具）是 Part 1 必背動詞，火車/公車/飛機照片都常出現。

items.title: 照片描述：澆花

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: A. The woman is planting a tree.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: B. The woman is picking some flowers.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: C. The woman is trimming the bushes.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: D. The woman is watering the plants.

items.question: 請看照片，選出最符合的描述。
options: The woman is planting a tree.
The woman is picking some flowers.
The woman is trimming the bushes.
The woman is watering the plants.
items.transcriptZh: 照片重點：一名女子拿著澆水壺，正替盆栽澆水。
items.tip: 園藝類照片動詞要分清楚：plant 種、pick 摘、trim 修剪、water 澆水。

items.title: 照片描述：工地

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: A. The workers are taking off their helmets.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: B. The workers are wearing safety helmets.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: C. The workers are climbing a ladder.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: D. The workers are paving the road.

items.question: 請看照片，選出最符合的描述。
options: The workers are taking off their helmets.
The workers are wearing safety helmets.
The workers are climbing a ladder.
The workers are paving the road.
optionsZh: 工人們正在脫下安全帽。
items.transcriptZh: 照片重點：兩名戴著安全帽、穿反光背心的工人在工地，旁邊放著交通錐。
items.tip: wearing（穿戴的狀態）vs putting on / taking off（穿脫的動作）是 Part 1 最經典的考點。

items.title: 照片描述：餐桌

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: A. People are sitting at the table.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: B. The table is being set for a meal.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: C. Chairs have been arranged around the table.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: D. The chairs are stacked in a corner.

items.question: 請看照片，選出最符合的描述。
options: People are sitting at the table.
The table is being set for a meal.
Chairs have been arranged around the table.
The chairs are stacked in a corner.
optionsZh: 椅子已排放在桌子四周。
items.transcriptZh: 照片重點：室內一張空餐桌，椅子整齊排放在四周，桌上有花瓶，照片中沒有人。
items.tip: 空景照常考「現在完成被動」have been arranged（已排好的狀態）；沒有人就刪掉所有進行中的人物動作。

items.title: 應答問題：新印表機位置

sentences.speaker: Q
sentences.text: Where did they put the new color printer?

items.question: What is the best response?
options: Next to the supply cabinet on the second floor.
No, the old one broke last week.
It prints twenty pages per minute.
optionsZh: 它每分鐘可以印二十頁。
items.transcriptZh: 他們把新的彩色印表機放在哪裡？
items.tip: Where 問地點，鎖定含方位介系詞（next to / on / near）的選項。

items.title: 應答問題：誰負責簡報

sentences.speaker: Q
sentences.text: Who's giving the presentation at the client meeting tomorrow?

items.question: What is the best response?
options: Ms. Patel from the sales team.
optionsZh: 業務團隊的 Patel 女士。
items.transcriptZh: 明天客戶會議由誰做簡報？
items.tip: Who 問人，答案通常是人名或職稱；地點與時間都是陷阱。

items.title: 應答問題：合約寄出了嗎

sentences.speaker: Q
sentences.text: Have you sent the revised contract to the supplier yet?

items.question: What is the best response?
options: Yes, I emailed it this morning.
optionsZh: 有，我今天早上用電子郵件寄出了。
items.transcriptZh: 你把修訂後的合約寄給供應商了嗎？
items.tip: Have you...yet? 問完成與否，Yes/No 加上具體說明是標準答法。

items.title: 應答問題：搭電梯還是走樓梯

sentences.speaker: Q
sentences.text: Should we take the elevator or the stairs to the rooftop café?

items.question: What is the best response?
options: The stairs — the elevator is being serviced.
I'd like an iced coffee, please.
Yes, the café is open today.
optionsZh: 走樓梯吧——電梯正在維修。
items.transcriptZh: 我們要搭電梯還是走樓梯去頂樓咖啡廳？
items.tip: A or B 選擇疑問句不能回答 Yes/No，直接選其中一項或給替代方案。

items.title: 應答問題：報告何時要交

sentences.speaker: Q
sentences.text: When do we need to submit the expense report?

items.question: What is the best response?
options: By the last day of the month.
items.transcriptZh: 我們什麼時候要交費用報告？
items.tip: When 問時間，by / before / on + 時間是正解常見形式。

items.title: 應答問題：為何店面提早關門

sentences.speaker: Q
sentences.text: Why is the shop closing early on Thursday?

items.question: What is the best response?
options: At four o'clock in the afternoon.
The staff are attending a training session.
items.transcriptZh: 為什麼店面星期四要提早關門？
items.tip: Why 問原因，正解常以 Because 開頭或直接給理由；時間選項是陷阱。

items.title: 應答問題：要不要幫忙搬箱子

sentences.speaker: Q
sentences.text: Would you like some help moving those boxes to the storage room?

items.question: What is the best response?
options: I moved here two years ago.
The storage room is quite large.
items.transcriptZh: 需要我幫你把那些箱子搬到儲藏室嗎？
items.tip: Would you like...? 是提議，接受（That would be great）或婉拒（No, thanks. I can manage）都是正解形式。move 的多義是陷阱。

items.title: 應答問題：客戶回覆了沒

sentences.speaker: Q
sentences.text: Has the client responded to our proposal?

items.question: What is the best response?
options: Not yet, but I'll follow up this afternoon.
optionsZh: 我們在溫哥華的新客戶。
還沒有，但我下午會再追蹤。
items.transcriptZh: 客戶回覆我們的提案了嗎？
items.tip: Not yet（還沒）是完成式問句的高頻正解，後面常補說下一步。

items.title: 應答問題：制服尺寸

sentences.speaker: Q
sentences.text: What size uniform should I order for you?

items.question: What is the best response?
options: Order it from the usual vendor.
optionsZh: 制服規定星期一開始實施。
items.transcriptZh: 我該幫你訂什麼尺寸的制服？
items.tip: What size 問尺寸，直接找 small / medium / large 或數字。

items.title: 應答問題：會議室借用

sentences.speaker: Q
sentences.text: Is the small meeting room available this afternoon?

items.question: What is the best response?
options: Yes, it was a productive meeting.
I'm afraid it's booked until five.
optionsZh: 是的，那場會議很有收穫。
恐怕它到五點前都被預訂了。
items.transcriptZh: 小會議室今天下午可以用嗎？
items.tip: 詢問 available 的問句，正解常是委婉否定（I'm afraid...）加原因。

items.title: 簡短對話：印錯的名片

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Hi, I ordered five hundred business cards last week, but my job title is printed incorrectly on them.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: I'm so sorry about that. Could you show me the order confirmation? We'll reprint them at no charge.

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Here it is. How long will the reprint take? I have a trade show on Friday.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: We'll put a rush on it — you can pick them up Wednesday afternoon.

items.question: What will the woman probably do on Wednesday?
items.transcriptZh: 女：您好，我上週訂了五百張名片，但上面的職稱印錯了。／男：非常抱歉。可以給我看訂單確認信嗎？我們會免費重印。／女：在這裡。重印要多久？我星期五有商展。／男：我們會加急處理——您星期三下午就能來拿。
items.tip: 題目問特定星期幾的行動，聽到日期時立刻對應說話者與動作。

items.title: 簡短對話：辦公用品預算

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Sarah, the department heads are asking why office supply spending doubled last quarter.

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Mostly because of the new hires — we set up twelve workstations in September.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: That makes sense. Could you put together a short summary before the budget review on Thursday?

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Of course. I'll have it on your desk by Wednesday morning.

items.question: Why did office supply spending increase?
options: The office moved to a larger building
optionsZh: 辦公室搬到更大的大樓
items.transcriptZh: 男：Sarah，各部門主管在問上一季辦公用品支出為何倍增。／女：主要是因為新進人員——我們九月設置了十二個工作站。／男：有道理。你能在星期四預算檢討會前整理一份簡短摘要嗎？／女：當然，星期三早上就會放在你桌上。
items.tip: 問原因的題目，答案常跟在 because / mostly because 後面。

items.title: 簡短對話：健身房會員優惠

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Welcome to Harbourside Fitness. Are you interested in a membership?

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Yes, but I travel a lot for work. Do you have a flexible plan?

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: We do — the Flex Pass lets you freeze your membership up to three months a year at no cost.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: That's exactly what I need. Can I sign up today?

items.question: What feature of the Flex Pass interests the man?
options: The option to pause his membership
items.transcriptZh: 女：歡迎來到 Harbourside 健身房，想了解會員方案嗎？／男：想，但我常出差，有彈性方案嗎？／女：有——Flex Pass 每年可免費凍結會籍最多三個月。／男：這正是我需要的，今天可以辦嗎？
items.tip: freeze / pause 是換句話說：聽力原文的字常在選項中被同義改寫。

items.title: 簡短對話：包裹寄送選項

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: I need to send this package to Calgary. What are my options?

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Standard delivery takes five business days for twelve dollars. Express arrives in two days for thirty.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: It's a birthday gift for this Saturday, so I'd better go with express.

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Good choice. Please fill out this customs form since it's going across the province.

items.question: Why does the man choose express delivery?
options: It is cheaper than standard delivery
The package must arrive by a specific date
optionsZh: 包裹必須在特定日期前送達
items.transcriptZh: 男：我要寄這個包裹到卡加利，有哪些選擇？／女：標準寄送五個工作天，十二元；快遞兩天到，三十元。／男：這是這星期六的生日禮物，我還是選快遞好了。／女：好選擇。因為是跨省寄送，請填這張表格。
items.tip: 選擇理由題：聽 so / because 前後，男子說「星期六生日禮物」就是關鍵。

items.title: 簡短對話：軟體升級通知

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Did you see the notice? IT is upgrading the accounting software this weekend.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: I did. We won't be able to access the system from Friday night until Monday morning.

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Right, so I'm processing all the invoices before I leave on Friday.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Good idea. I'll remind the rest of the team to do the same.

items.question: What will the man probably do next?
items.transcriptZh: 女：你看到通知了嗎？資訊部這週末要升級會計軟體。／男：看到了，從星期五晚上到星期一早上都無法使用系統。／女：對，所以我星期五下班前會把所有發票處理完。／男：好主意，我會提醒團隊其他人也這麼做。
items.tip: 「接下來做什麼」聽最後一句：remind the team = notify team members。

items.title: 簡短對話：餐廳外送合作

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Our lunch orders have dropped since the office park across the street closed.

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: I've noticed. What if we partnered with a delivery app to reach customers farther away?

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: The commission fees worry me, but it's worth testing for a couple of months.

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: I'll contact the two biggest platforms this week and compare their terms.

items.question: What is the man concerned about?
items.transcriptZh: 男：對街辦公園區關閉後，我們的午餐訂單掉了不少。／女：我注意到了。不如跟外送平台合作，接觸更遠的客人？／男：佣金費用讓我擔心，但值得試個兩三個月。／女：我這週會聯絡兩大平台，比較他們的條件。
items.tip: concern / worry 題：直接聽 worries me / I'm concerned 前後的名詞。

items.title: 簡短獨白：辦公室搬遷說明

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Good morning, everyone. Before we start the week, a few reminders about Friday's office move.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Please pack all personal items into the labeled boxes by Thursday evening.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: The movers will handle computers and monitors, so please leave them on your desks.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: If you have any fragile items, bring them to the front office and we'll transport them separately.

items.question: What should employees leave on their desks?
items.transcriptZh: 大家早安。開始這週工作前，提醒幾件星期五辦公室搬遷的事。請在星期四晚上前把個人物品裝進貼好標籤的箱子。搬家公司會處理電腦和螢幕，請把它們留在桌上。若有易碎物品，請拿到前台，我們會另外運送。
items.tip: 指示類獨白常考「什麼東西怎麼處理」，把物品與動作配對著聽。

items.title: 簡短獨白：牙醫診所留言

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Hello, this message is for Mr. Adams. This is Westgate Dental Clinic calling.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: We need to reschedule your appointment on the fourteenth, as Dr. Hughes will be away at a conference.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: We have openings on the sixteenth at 2 P.M. or the seventeenth at 10 A.M.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Please call us back at your earliest convenience to confirm a new time. Thank you.

items.question: Why is the clinic calling Mr. Adams?
options: To remind him of a checkup
items.transcriptZh: 您好，這則留言是給 Adams 先生的，這裡是 Westgate 牙醫診所。由於 Hughes 醫師十四日將出席研討會，我們需要更改您當天的預約。十六日下午兩點或十七日上午十點有空檔。請盡快回電確認新的時間，謝謝。
items.tip: 電話留言題必考「來電目的」，答案通常在第二句：reschedule = change appointment。

items.title: 簡短獨白：新產品發表開場

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Thank you all for coming to today's launch event.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: In a moment, our chief designer will demonstrate the new solar-powered charger.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: After the demonstration, you'll find sample units at each table for a hands-on trial.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Members of the press are invited to a question-and-answer session in the next room at four o'clock.

items.question: What will happen at four o'clock?
options: A question-and-answer session will be held
items.transcriptZh: 感謝各位參加今天的發表會。稍後我們的首席設計師將展示新款太陽能充電器。展示結束後，每桌都有樣品供實際試用。四點鐘，媒體朋友可到隔壁房間參加問答時間。
items.tip: 活動流程題把「時間點＋活動」邊聽邊排序，題目常挑最後一個時間點考。

items.title: 簡短獨白：百貨公司廣播

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Attention, Maplewood Department Store shoppers.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: For the next hour only, all winter coats on the third floor are an additional thirty percent off.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Also, our gift-wrapping counter on the ground floor is now open until 9 P.M. daily.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Thank you for shopping with us, and happy holidays.

items.question: What is located on the third floor?
items.transcriptZh: Maplewood 百貨的顧客請注意。接下來一小時內，三樓所有冬季外套再打七折。另外，一樓的禮品包裝櫃檯即日起每天營業到晚上九點。感謝您的光臨，佳節愉快。
items.tip: 賣場廣播愛考「樓層＋商品」配對，聽到數字樓層立刻記對應物。

items.title: 會議室預約衝突

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Hi Marcus, I booked Conference Room B for two o'clock, but the schedule now shows your team in there.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Oh, sorry about that. Our client call ran long, so I extended the booking without checking.

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: No problem, but I have six people coming for a budget review. Is Room C free?

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Let me check... yes, it's open all afternoon. I'll move my booking there instead, so you can keep Room B.

items.question: What will the man probably do next?
options: Move his booking to Room C
optionsZh: 把他的預約改到 C 會議室
預約明天的 B 會議室
items.transcriptZh: 女子預約的 B 會議室被男子的團隊佔用。男子道歉並確認 C 會議室整個下午有空，表示會把自己的預約移過去，讓女子繼續使用 B 會議室。
items.tip: 題目問「接下來會做什麼」，答案通常在對話最後一句：I'll move my booking there。

items.title: 出差報帳問題

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Hello, I submitted my travel expenses from the Manchester trip last week, but I haven't been reimbursed yet.

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Let me have a look. Ah, I see the problem — the hotel receipt is missing from your claim.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: That's strange, I'm sure I attached it. Could I email you a copy this afternoon?

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Certainly. Once I receive it, the payment should go through by Friday.

items.question: Why has the man not been reimbursed?
options: A receipt was missing from his claim
optionsZh: 他的申請缺了一張收據
items.transcriptZh: 男子上週出差的報帳還沒入帳。女子查看後發現是飯店收據沒附上。男子下午會補寄，女子說收到後週五前就會撥款。
items.tip: 問「為什麼」時，注意轉折處：I see the problem — the hotel receipt is missing。

items.title: 新印表機的使用

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Have you tried the new colour printer on the third floor? I can't get it to accept my staff card.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: You need to register your card with IT first. It only takes a minute on the intranet.

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Oh, I didn't know that. Is there a link somewhere?

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Yes, it's on the IT support page. I'll send it to you right now.

items.question: What does the man say the woman needs to do?
options: Use the printer on another floor
optionsZh: 向資訊部門註冊她的卡片
使用其他樓層的印表機
items.transcriptZh: 女子的員工卡無法使用三樓新彩色印表機。男子說要先在內部網路向 IT 註冊卡片，只要一分鐘，並馬上把連結傳給她。
items.tip: 聽到 You need to... 就是解題句，後面接的動作即為答案。

items.title: 午餐外燴訂購

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Sandra, the caterer just called. They can't deliver the sandwiches before noon on Thursday.

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: That's a problem — the workshop starts at eleven thirty. Could we move lunch to one o'clock?

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: The afternoon session begins at one. What if we start the workshop half an hour earlier instead?

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Good idea. I'll email the attendees about the new start time today.

items.question: What will the woman do today?
options: Email attendees about a time change
optionsZh: 寄信通知與會者時間變更
items.transcriptZh: 外燴週四中午前無法送達三明治，但工作坊十一點半開始。兩人討論後決定把工作坊提早半小時開始，女子今天會寄信通知與會者新的開始時間。
items.tip: 多個提案被否決後，最後被同意的方案（Good idea 之後）才是答案。

items.title: 軟體升級通知

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Did you see the notice? The accounting software will be offline for an upgrade this weekend.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: This weekend? I was planning to finish the quarterly statements on Saturday.

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: You might want to finish them by Friday evening, or wait until Monday.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: I'd better do them Friday, then. The statements are due first thing Monday morning.

items.question: When will the man most likely finish the statements?
items.transcriptZh: 會計軟體週末升級停機。男子原打算週六完成季報表，但報表週一一早要交，所以決定改在週五完成。
items.tip: 時間題把每個選項都記下來：週六不行（停機）、週一來不及（要交件），刪去法剩週五。

items.title: 招募新設計師

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: How did the interviews for the graphic designer position go yesterday?

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Quite well. Two candidates stood out, but one of them asked for a salary above our range.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Hmm. Is the other one available to start soon?

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Yes, she can start on the first of next month. I'm sending her portfolio to you now for a final look.

items.question: What will the man receive from the woman?
items.transcriptZh: 兩位平面設計師候選人中，一位要求的薪資超出範圍；另一位下月一號可上班。女子正把她的作品集傳給男子做最後確認。
items.tip: 對話結尾 I'm sending her portfolio to you 直接對應題目 receive。

items.title: 店面促銷陳列

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Tom, the spring promotion starts Monday. Have the display stands arrived yet?

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Only half of them. The supplier says the rest won't arrive until Wednesday.

sentences.speaker: W
sentences.text: Then let's set up the front window with what we have and finish the aisles later.

sentences.speaker: M
sentences.text: Sounds good. I'll start on the window display this afternoon.

items.question: What does the woman suggest doing?
options: Setting up the front window first
items.transcriptZh: 春季促銷週一開始，但陳列架只到了一半，其餘週三才到。女子建議先用現有的陳列架佈置前方櫥窗，走道之後再完成。男子下午就開始佈置。
items.tip: suggest 題聽 let's 開頭的句子：let's set up the front window。

items.title: 機場登機門廣播

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Attention passengers on Flight 782 to Denver.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Due to a late arriving aircraft, boarding will now begin at three fifteen instead of two forty.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: The departure gate has also changed from Gate 12 to Gate 18, located past the food court.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: We apologize for the inconvenience and thank you for your patience.

items.question: What are the listeners asked to do?
options: Wait for boarding at a new gate
optionsZh: 立即在 12 號登機門登機
items.transcriptZh: 飛往丹佛的 782 班機因飛機晚到，登機時間從 2:40 延到 3:15，登機門也從 12 號改到美食街過去的 18 號。
items.tip: 廣播題抓「變更」：時間 instead of、地點 changed from... to...，新資訊才是答案。

items.title: 電話語音留言

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Hello, this is Emma Whitfield from Brighton Dental Clinic, calling for Mr. Doyle.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: I'm afraid we need to reschedule your appointment on Thursday, as Dr. Hughes will be away at a conference.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: We have openings on Friday at ten or the following Tuesday at two.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Please ring us back at your earliest convenience to let us know which suits you better.

items.question: Why is the speaker calling?
items.transcriptZh: 牙醫診所來電留言：Hughes 醫師週四要參加研討會，需要重新安排 Doyle 先生的預約，可改週五十點或下週二兩點，請回電告知。
items.tip: 留言題的目的常在第二句：we need to reschedule your appointment。

items.title: 公司內部廣播

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Good morning, everyone. This is a reminder from the facilities team.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: The parking garage will be repainted next week, from Monday through Wednesday.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: During this time, please park in the overflow lot on Fifth Street and bring your ticket to reception for validation.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Normal parking will resume on Thursday morning.

items.question: What should employees do with their parking tickets?
options: Mail them to the facilities team
items.transcriptZh: 總務廣播：下週一至三停車場重新油漆，請改停第五街的備用停車場，並把停車票拿到接待處蓋章，週四早上恢復正常。
items.tip: 細節題聽 please 後面的指示：bring your ticket to reception。

items.title: 產品發表會開場

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Welcome to the launch of the AquaPure Series Five, our most advanced water filter yet.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: In a moment, our head engineer will demonstrate how the new filter removes twice as many impurities as the previous model.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: After the demonstration, members of the press are invited to a question and answer session in the next room.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Finally, everyone will receive a sample unit to test at home.

items.question: What will the listeners receive?
items.transcriptZh: AquaPure 第五代濾水器發表會：總工程師將示範新濾心去除雜質的能力是前代兩倍，之後媒體可到隔壁進行問答，最後每人都會拿到一台樣品機回家試用。
items.tip: receive 題聽最後：everyone will receive a sample unit。

items.title: 導覽行程說明

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Good afternoon, and welcome to the Kingsley Museum of Industry.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Our tour begins in the steam engine hall and continues through the textile gallery on the first floor.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Please note that photography is permitted everywhere except in the special exhibition room.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: We shall finish at the gift shop, where tour members enjoy a ten percent discount today.

items.question: Where is photography not allowed?
items.transcriptZh: 博物館導覽：行程從蒸汽機廳開始，經過一樓紡織展覽區，除特展室外皆可拍照，最後在禮品店結束，團員今日享九折優惠。
items.tip: except 是關鍵字：permitted everywhere except... 後面就是不行的地方。

items.title: 廣播天氣與交通

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: You're listening to Radio 4 Sydney with your midday update.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Heavy rain is expected across the harbour area from about four this afternoon.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Drivers should allow extra travel time, as the Western Bridge is already down to one lane for repairs.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Coming up next, our finance report with today's market movements.

items.question: What will the listeners hear next?
items.transcriptZh: 雪梨電台午間快報：下午四點起港區將有大雨，西橋施工只剩單線通行，駕駛請預留時間。接下來是今日財經報導。
items.tip: next 題聽結尾 Coming up next 之後的內容。

items.title: 店內促銷廣播

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Attention, Greenfield Market shoppers.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: For the next thirty minutes, all fresh bakery items are twenty percent off at the bakery counter.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Also, don't forget to pick up a free reusable bag with any purchase over forty dollars.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Thank you for shopping with us, and have a wonderful day.

items.question: How can shoppers get a free reusable bag?
options: By spending more than forty dollars
items.transcriptZh: 超市廣播：接下來三十分鐘烘焙商品八折；消費滿四十美元即贈環保購物袋一個。
items.tip: 兩個優惠別混淆：八折是烘焙品、贈袋條件是滿 40 美元。題目問袋子。

items.title: 研討會行政說明

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Before we begin the afternoon sessions, a few quick announcements.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: The three o'clock marketing workshop has been moved from Room 204 to the main auditorium due to high registration.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Box lunches are still available at the registration desk for those who have not picked one up.

sentences.speaker: N
sentences.text: Finally, please complete the feedback survey in your welcome packet before you leave today.

items.question: Why was the marketing workshop moved?
options: The original room was being repaired
The speaker requested a larger stage
items.transcriptZh: 研討會宣布：三點的行銷工作坊因報名踴躍，從 204 教室移到大禮堂；還沒領餐盒的人可到報到處領取；離開前請填寫意見調查表。
items.tip: due to 後面就是原因：due to high registration ＝ 報名人數多。
